articles.title: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Rajasthan Royals Ownership 2026: Lakshmi Mittal Joins IPL Consortium
articles.what_this_means: Lakshmi Mittal joins Rajasthan Royals' ownership consortium alongside Aadar Poonawala and existing principal owner Manoj Badale, bringing world-class financial expertise and global business networks to the IPL franchise heading into 2025. This consortium model strengthens RR's infrastructure, recruitment strategy, and competitive positioning for future campaigns.

articles.title: Kartik Sharma IPL 2025: CSK Star's Match-Winning Half-Century
articles.what_this_means: Young CSK batter Kartik Sharma finally justified his record IPL 2025 signing with a match-winning 52 against MI, guided by mentorship from Dhoni and Fleming. CSK won by 12 runs in a crucial victory that could shape their playoff push.
